target: fj-dispatch vmap gather/scatter shifted hotspot family

profile_backed_target.source: fresh rch Criterion baseline for vmap multiplier family
profile_backed_target.command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-khpu-vmap-pass6 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- 'vmap_gather|vmap_scatter|vmap_dot_i64|vmap_scan|vmap_switch|vmap_while' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

candidate.one_lever: Flatten batched gather operands from [B, N, ...] to [B*N, ...], offset per-batch indices, and call eval_gather once instead of using the generic loop-and-stack fallback.
candidate.reason: The candidate regressed the targeted gather rows on the rch worker selected for the after run, so it did not meet the >=2.0 keep threshold.

after_benchmark.command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-khpu-bench-after rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- 'vmap_gather|vmap_scatter|vmap_dot_i64|vmap_scan|vmap_switch|vmap_while' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

score.rationale: Candidate did not produce a real win and the retained source tree has no fj-dispatch diff.

behavior_proof.ordering: No retained source change; transform order, gather index order, dispatch order, and ledger evidence ordering are unchanged.
behavior_proof.tie_breaking: No retained comparator, map iteration, branch-selection, or fallback tie-breaker change.
behavior_proof.floating_point: No retained primitive evaluation, AD arithmetic, dtype, or tolerance change.
behavior_proof.rng: No retained RNG primitive, seed, state, or ordering change.
behavior_proof.strict_hardened: No retained compatibility-mode or unknown-feature handling change.

validation.notes: Candidate behavior suite passed before rejection: 223 unit tests, 55 dispatch_p2c004_suite tests, and benchmark harness smoke tests.

next_profile_notes: The generic batched-operand gather path remains a hotspot but the flattened-index single-call approach is not viable as implemented.
The scatter midpoint remains larger than gather on the pass-6 baseline; next passes should re-profile before selecting any scatter-specific lever.
